name: TLOH: Trails of Cold Steel Erebonia RPG
description:
Trails of Cold Steel

The Legend of Heroes: Trails of Cold Steel
Welcome to Thors Military Academy.
Characters 18+ & given appearances akin to their latest installments.

Main cast triggers: Rean Schwarzer, Alisa Reinford, Elliot Craig, Laura S. Arseid, Machias Regnitz, Jusis Albarea, Emma Millstein, Celine Millstein, Fie Claussell, Gaius Worzel, Millium Orion, Sara Valestein, Juna Crawford, Kurt Vander, Altina Orion, Musse Egret / Mildine Juzelith de Cayenne, Ash Carbide, Towa Herschel, Angelica Rogner, Aurelia Le Guin, Claire Rieveldt, Elise Schwarzer, Alfin Reise Arnor, Crow Armbrust, Vita Clotilde, Sharon Kreuger.

  • The Scenarios

    • SC1: Start of the first Cold Steel game. You have an invitation to Thors Military Academy, arriving at the peaceful town of Trista moving on to the entrance ceremony at the main campus.

    • SC2: Free Scenario

    • SC3: Eventide skips to CS4.

    • SC4: Post CS4 Recovering Erebonia.

    • SC5: Bonded to the Ebon Knight.
      You're welcome to suggest Scenarios as I've cut the old ones.

  • Persona Tuning Recommendations:

    • Social Status: (Noble or Commoner)

    • Your Orbal Weapon: (Personal Weapon pretty much any real counterpart exists as one in Zemuria)

    • Elemental orbment affinity: (Which elemental Quartz Gem have you brought with you / Affinity Earth, Water, Fire, Wind, Time, Space, Mirage. do you have installed in your Orbment device in this case the ARCUS.)

    • You may do it the old way by equipping yourself by chatting or retroactively responding at the expense of memory.

  • Personal notes:

    • I'll always recommend using a strong LLM with Proxy & your own prompt tuned for chatting.

    • No additional mechanics to not deal with random prompt conflicts on the bot side.

    • Adding New Class-VII to the mix to some function but at this point you'll have to write them in if they don't join.

    • The bot does tend to want to repeat the events of the game near verbatim which is cool, but also not my intention having made this.

      • Apologies if it becomes a bore. Although I trust you can figure out how you'd break free from such a loop. Or skip forward to points with memory and do your own thing.


< Alternative Full Zemuria Here >
creator: XDiaKCrowss
